question: What is the relative position between the baby and the stuffed animal? Select from the following options: (A) The stuffed animal is on the floor. (B) The stuffed animal is behind the baby. (C) The baby is touching the stuffed animal. (D) The baby is holding the stuffed animal.
gold_answer: The baby is touching the stuffed animal
answer_choices: The stuffed animal is on the floor
The stuffed animal is behind the baby
The baby is touching the stuffed animal
The baby is holding the stuffed animal
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
